case_title: RYANNON VARIN VS. MENDOCINO HOTEL & RESORT CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST RYANNON VARIN, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-01-2006, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-16-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DAVE DAVENPORT, CSR#1694. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2006 CONTINUED TO JUL-31-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-25-2006 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ CSR# 7782 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Continued To Sep-25-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/25/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung CSR#4819. (212)
